message:
🌱 Add OVN-Kubernetes to ADOPTERS.md (#5294)

Add OVN-Kubernetes as an adopter with guided install mission,
referencing engagement from OVN-K maintainer @tssurya in
ovn-kubernetes/ovn-kubernetes#6124.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,3 +18,4 @@ Listed below are organizations that have adopted, or benefitted from, KubeStella
 | Kmesh | Guided install mission for Kmesh via KubeStellar Console, with engagement tracked in [kmesh-net/kmesh#1609](https://github.com/kmesh-net/kmesh/issues/1609) | Sandbox | [Kmesh](https://kmesh.net) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kmesh) |
 | PipeCD | Guided install mission for PipeCD via KubeStellar Console, positively received by PipeCD maintainer @zyzzmohit in [pipe-cd/pipecd#6593](https://github.com/pipe-cd/pipecd/issues/6593) | Sandbox | [PipeCD](https://pipecd.dev) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-pipecd) |
 | Confidential Containers | Guided install mission for Confidential Containers via KubeStellar Console, with maintainer engagement and test case collaboration tracked in [confidential-containers/confidential-containers#354](https://github.com/confidential-containers/confidential-containers/issues/354) | Sandbox | [Confidential Containers](https://confidentialcontainers.org) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-confidential-containers) |
+| OVN-Kubernetes | Guided install mission for OVN-Kubernetes via KubeStellar Console, with engagement tracked in [ovn-kubernetes/ovn-kubernetes#6124](https://github.com/ovn-kubernetes/ovn-kubernetes/issues/6124) | Sandbox | [OVN-Kubernetes](https://www.ovn.org/ovn-kubernetes/) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-ovn-kubernetes) |
